mapper.delete: delete from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where WORK_TICKET_ID = #{ticketId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and allot_Type = #{allotType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT SD2.* FROM SYS_DEPT SD2 where SD2.dept_level = '2' and SD2.ticket_level = '2'
and SD2.IS_MACHINE = '1'
and SD2.IS_LABOR = '1'

SELECT ID "deptId", DEPT_NAME "deptName" FROM ( SELECT ID,DEPT_NAME,DEPT_LEVEL FROM SYS_DEPT START WITH ID = (SELECT ID FROM SYS_DEPT WHERE ID = #{deptId,jdbcType=BIGINT} CONNECT BY PRIOR PARENT_ID=ID) WHERE DEPT_LEVEL = #{deptLevel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select TYT.PLAN_ID PLAN_ID, TYT.EQUIPMENT_ID EQUIPMENT_ID, TYT.EQUIPMENT_NO EQUIPMENT_NO, TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID, TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO, TYT.DEPT_PARENT_ID DEPT_ID, MM3SD.DEPT_NAME DEPT_NAME, TYT.PROCESS_CODE PROCESS_DETAIL_CODE, TYT.PROCESS_NAME PROCESS_DETAIL_NAME, MMSD.ID MACHINE_DEPT_ID, MMSD.DEPT_NAME MACHINE_DEPT_NAME, MM.MAC_TYPE_CODE EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, MMT.MAC_TYPE_NAME EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, MM2SD.DEPT_NAME TRAN_MACHINE_DEPT_NAME, MM2SD.ID TRAN_MACHINE_DEPT_ID, MM2.MAC_TYPE_CODE TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, MMT2.MAC_TYPE_NAME TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, case when MC.WORK_TYPE = '2' or to_char (TYT.REMARK) = '车载' then wp.WEIGHT_GOODS else TYTI.TON end ton from T_YARD_TALLY TYT join T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM TYTI on TYT.id = TYTI.TALLY_ID left join M_MACHINE MM on MM.ID = TYT.EQUIPMENT_ID left join M_MACHINE MM2 on MM2.id = TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID left join M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT on MMT.MAC_TYPE_CODE = MM.MAC_TYPE_CODE left join M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT2 on MMT2.MAC_TYPE_CODE = MM2.MAC_TYPE_CODE left join SYS_DEPT MMSD on MM.DEPT_ID = MMSD.ID left join SYS_DEPT MM2SD on MM2.DEPT_ID = MM2SD.ID left join sys_dept MM3SD on TYT.DEPT_PARENT_ID = MM3SD.id left join M_CARGO MC on MC.CARGO_CODE = TYTI.CARGO_CODE left join WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND wp on wp.NOTE_ID = TYT.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID where TYT.DEL_FLAG='0' and TYT.PLAN_ID = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select TYT.PLAN_ID "planId", TYT.EQUIPMENT_ID "equipmentId", TYT.EQUIPMENT_NO "equipmentNo", TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID transportEquipmentId, TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_NO "transportEquipmentNo", TYT.DEPT_PARENT_ID "deptId", MM3SD.DEPT_NAME "deptName", TYT.PROCESS_CODE "processDetailCode", TYT.PROCESS_NAME "processDetailName", MMSD.ID "machineDeptId", MMSD.DEPT_NAME "machineDeptName", MM.MAC_TYPE_CODE "equipmentTypeCode", MMT.MAC_TYPE_NAME "equipmentTypeName", MM2SD.DEPT_NAME "tranMachineDeptName", MM2SD.ID "tranMachineDeptId", MM2.MAC_TYPE_CODE "transportEquipmentTypeCode", MMT2.MAC_TYPE_NAME "transportEquipmentTypeName", case when MC.WORK_TYPE = '2' or to_char (TYT.REMARK) = '车载' then wp.WEIGHT_GOODS else TYTI.TON end "ton" from T_YARD_TALLY TYT join T_YARD_TALLY_ITEM TYTI on TYT.id = TYTI.TALLY_ID left join M_MACHINE MM on MM.ID = TYT.EQUIPMENT_ID left join M_MACHINE MM2 on MM2.id = TYT.TRANSPORT_EQUIPMENT_ID left join M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT on MMT.MAC_TYPE_CODE = MM.MAC_TYPE_CODE left join M_MACHINE_TYPE MMT2 on MMT2.MAC_TYPE_CODE = MM2.MAC_TYPE_CODE left join SYS_DEPT MMSD on MM.DEPT_ID = MMSD.ID left join SYS_DEPT MM2SD on MM2.DEPT_ID = MM2SD.ID left join sys_dept MM3SD on TYT.DEPT_PARENT_ID = MM3SD.id left join M_CARGO MC on MC.CARGO_CODE = TYTI.CARGO_CODE left join WFG_PORTMIS_POUND.WEIGHT_RECORD_POUND wp on wp.NOTE_ID = TYT.WEIGHBRIDGE_ID
where TYT.DEL_FLAG='0' and TYT.PLAN_ID = #{planId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.delete: delete from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL where id in ( select TPWTD.ID from T_PRD_WORK_TICKET TPWT left join T_PRD_WORK_TICKET_DETAIL TPWTD on TPWTD.WORK_TICKET_ID = TPWT.ID where TPWTD.ALLOT_TYPE in ('2','3') and TPWT.WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId,jdbcType=BIGINT} )
